de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionMethodCall

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecutionMethodCall, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall

    public interface IExecutionMethodCall
extends IExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>

    A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a method call, e.g. foo().

    The default implementation is ExecutionMethodCall which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder, ExecutionMethodCall

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionNode

        INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_END, INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_START

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      MethodReference getExplicitConstructorMethodReference()
      Returns a copy of the MethodReference which calls the explicit constructor instead of the implicit constructor.
      IProgramMethod getExplicitConstructorProgramMethod()
      Returns the explicit constructor.
      MethodReference getMethodReference()
      Returns the MethodReference instance of the called method.
      ImmutableList<IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<?>> getMethodReturns()
      Returns the up to now discovered IExecutionBaseMethodReturns.
      IProgramMethod getProgramMethod()
      Returns the called IProgramMethod.
      boolean isImplicitConstructor()
      Checks if an implicit constructor is called.

    • Method Detail

      • getMethodReference

        MethodReference getMethodReference()
        Returns the MethodReference instance of the called method.
        Returns:
        The MethodReference of the called method.

      • getProgramMethod

        IProgramMethod getProgramMethod()
        Returns the called IProgramMethod.
        Returns:
        The called IProgramMethod.

      • isImplicitConstructor

        boolean isImplicitConstructor()
        Checks if an implicit constructor is called.
        Returns:
        true implicit constructor is called, false method or explicit constructor is called.

      • getExplicitConstructorMethodReference

        MethodReference getExplicitConstructorMethodReference()
        Returns a copy of the MethodReference which calls the explicit constructor instead of the implicit constructor.
        Returns:
        The MethodReference to the explicit constructor or null if no constructor is called.

      • getExplicitConstructorProgramMethod

        IProgramMethod getExplicitConstructorProgramMethod()
        Returns the explicit constructor.
        Returns:
        The explicit constructor or null if no constructor is called.

      • getMethodReturns

        ImmutableList<IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<?>> getMethodReturns()
        Returns the up to now discovered IExecutionBaseMethodReturns.
        Returns:
        The up to now discovered IExecutionBaseMethodReturns.
